tools.name: search_stores
tools.description: Search the public Mystoq store directory (Algerian online shops). Filter by keyword (store name), wilaya, or plan. Returns store name, wilaya, storefront URL and plan tier. Public business listings only — no merchant personal data.

tools.name: get_store
tools.description: Get a public Mystoq store by its slug: name, wilaya, storefront URL, plan tier and member-since. Public info only.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List Mystoq subscription plans with monthly/yearly/lifetime prices (DZD) — useful to answer "how much does Mystoq cost".

tools.name: platform_stats
tools.description: Mystoq network statistics: number of active stores and wilayas covered.

tools.name: cod_profit
tools.description: Compute true CAC and net cash-on-delivery profit for an Algerian online store, accounting for the return/refusal rate. Returns base and confirmation-call scenarios.

tools.name: yalidine_delivery
tools.description: Estimate delivery success/return rate and typical delivery time for a destination wilaya in Algeria (region-based network estimate).

tools.name: order_risk
tools.description: Score the fraud/return risk of an Algerian COD order from its signals (phone, history, etc.) — Mystoq FakeShield logic.

tools.name: create_store
tools.description: Register a NEW Mystoq store (tenant). Returns the store id, slug and an access token. No auth needed. WRITE.

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a product in the authenticated merchant's store. Requires Bearer token. WRITE.

tools.name: set_price
tools.description: Update a product's price (and optional compare_price) in the authenticated store. Requires Bearer token. WRITE.

tools.name: publish
tools.description: Publish a product (set status=active) so it shows on the storefront. Requires Bearer token. WRITE.

tools.name: delete_product
tools.description: Delete a product from the authenticated store (reversible cleanup — used by the agent's ephemeral live-demo). Requires Bearer token; only the owner's own product. WRITE/DESTRUCTIVE.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_product" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a product in the authenticated merchant's store. Requires Bearer token. WRITE.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "set_price" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_stores, get_store · Private data: create_store, create_product, set_price, publish, delete_product · Public sink: publish · Destructive: delete_product.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_stores, get_store · Private data: create_store, create_product, set_price, publish, delete_product · Public sink: publish · Destructive: delete_product

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
